title: Floral Velvety Greek Anchovy Salad
description: A light Greek salad that balances the briny depth of sous‑vide anchovy fillets with a silky low‑fat Greek yogurt dressing, finished with fresh herbs and edible violet petals.
instructions: Preheat a sous‑vide water bath to 80 °C (176 °F).
Season the anchovy fillets with a pinch of salt and pepper, then place them in a vacuum‑sealed bag with a tablespoon of capers. Seal the bag and cook in the sous‑vide bath for 30 minutes.
After cooking, remove the fillets, pat dry, and set aside to cool slightly.
In a bowl, whisk together the low‑fat Greek yogurt, lemon juice, and a teaspoon of olive oil until smooth. Season with salt and pepper. If desired, fold in a few chopped dill and basil leaves.
Add the diced cucumber, halved cherry tomatoes, and thinly sliced red onion to the bowl. Gently toss to combine.
Once the anchovy fillets have cooled to a safe serving temperature (around 55 °C), add them to the salad and gently fold to coat.
Plate the salad on a shallow dish. Garnish each serving with a teaspoon of edible violet petals and a sprinkle of fresh dill. Serve immediately for a crisp, velvety experience.
